name: Full Deployment Pipeline
description: Fully automated end-to-end deployment of the Horizon Books demo to Microsoft Fabric. 4 phases, 12 steps: Provision (Lakehouses, CSV upload, Notebooks) → Execute (NB01 run, Dataflows + Pipeline deploy, Pipeline run, SQL setup) → Model & AI (Semantic Model, Report, Folders, DataAgent) → Validate.

tasks.name: Create 3 Lakehouses
tasks.description: Phase 1 Step 1: Create 3 schema-enabled Lakehouses (BronzeLH, SilverLH, GoldLH) and wait for GoldLH SQL endpoint provisioning (up to 180s).

tasks.name: Upload CSV Files
tasks.description: Phase 1 Step 2: Upload 17 CSV files to BronzeLH Files/ via OneLake DFS API (Finance: 4, HR: 5, Operations: 8).

tasks.name: Deploy 4 Notebooks
tasks.description: Phase 1 Step 3: Deploy 4 Spark Notebooks (BronzeToSilver, WebEnrichment, SilverToGold, Forecasting) each bound to its default Lakehouse.

tasks.name: Run Bronze-to-Silver
tasks.description: Phase 2 Step 4: Execute NB01_BronzeToSilver notebook to clean, validate, deduplicate raw data from BronzeLH into SilverLH (skippable).

tasks.name: Deploy Dataflows & Pipeline
tasks.description: Phase 2 Step 5: Create 3 Dataflow Gen2 items (DF_Finance, DF_HR, DF_Operations) and 1 Data Pipeline (PL_HorizonBooks_Orchestration). Validate OAuth2 connections.

tasks.name: Run Orchestration Pipeline
tasks.description: Phase 2 Step 6: Trigger PL_HorizonBooks_Orchestration pipeline: 3 DataFlows (parallel) → NB01 → NB02 → NB03 → NB04 (sequential). 30min timeout (skippable).

tasks.name: Execute SQL Scripts
tasks.description: Phase 2 Step 7: Deploy and run temp SQL setup notebook on GoldLH to execute CreateTables.sql + GenerateDateDimension.sql (DimDate table + supplementary tables).

tasks.name: Deploy Semantic Model
tasks.description: Phase 3 Step 8: Deploy HorizonBooksModel Semantic Model (Direct Lake on GoldLH SQL endpoint, TMDL definition, 23 tables, 27 relationships, 96 DAX measures).

tasks.name: Deploy Power BI Report
tasks.description: Phase 3 Step 9: Deploy HorizonBooksAnalytics Power BI Report (PBIR, 10 pages, bound to Semantic Model, remaps RegisteredResources).

tasks.name: Organize Workspace Folders
tasks.description: Phase 3 Step 10: Create and organize items into 5 workspace folders (01-Data Storage, 02-Data Ingestion, 03-Data Transformation, 04-Orchestration, 05-Analytics).

tasks.name: Deploy Data Agent
tasks.description: Phase 3 Step 11: Deploy HorizonBooks DataAgent for natural-language data exploration (requires F64+ capacity, skippable on trial).

tasks.name: Validate Deployment
tasks.description: Phase 4 Step 12: Run deployment validation checks — verify all expected items exist, dataflow connections are bound, lakehouse tables present (skippable).
